category_sources: source_facts.description identifies vimpager as using Vim as PAGER.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.repo use the official lowercase project name vimpager.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/rkitover/vimpager; per instructions repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says use Vim as PAGER; source_facts.executables lists vimpager and vimcat.
